study_title: Transcriptomic analysis of the effects of Acersmo activation/inhibition on olfactory genes in Apis mellifera
Transcriptomic analysis of the effects of Acersmo activation/inhibition on olfactory genes in Apis mellifera
Apis mellifera ligustica Raw sequence reads
sample_description: capped frames of worker brood were shook vigorously to get rid of bees, and then kept in a humid incubator at 34 degree; every morning adult bees emerged from their cells were marked on the thorax with paint and returned to the hive. 21-day-old foragers were captured at the entrance of the source colony using soft forceps when marked bees of twenty-fist day have pollen loads on their hind legs.

sample_description: capped frames of worker brood were shook vigorously to get rid of bees, and then kept in a humid incubator at 34 degree; every morning adult bees emerged from their cells were marked on the thorax with paint and returned to the hive. 10-day-old nurses were collected from the hive when marked bees of tenth day entered the cells and were nursing the larvae.
